title: rubus × micranthelus
intro: Rubus × micranthelus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or thimbleberry, is a type of bramble plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties that can help soothe wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus × micranthelus include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support immune function. Rubus × micranthelus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
